ddls:
CREATE TABLE "persons" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the person */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the person */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the person's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the person's record was last updated */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the person's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facts" (
  "fact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fact */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person the fact belongs to */,
  "fact_type" TEXT /* Type of fact (e.g., family, friendship, interest, employment) */,
  "fact_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the fact */,
  "fact_ref" INTEGER /* Reference ID for related facts (if applicable) */,
  "fact_deets" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fact */,
  "fact_importance" INTEGER /* Importance rating of the fact (1-5 scale) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the fact was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the fact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facts_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who has this interest */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest or hobby */,
  "interest_type" TEXT /* Type of interest (e.g., hobby, skill) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency or interest */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of pursuing the interest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interest was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interests_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment record */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person employed */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job held */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the company or employer */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment (null if currently employed) */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary or compensation for the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the employment is current */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship */,
  "person_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first person in the relationship */,
  "person_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second person in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., friend, colleague) */,
  "relationship_strength" INTEGER /* Strength of the relationship (1-5 scale) */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_person_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("person_id1") REFERENCES persons ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_person_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("person_id2") REFERENCES persons ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reference */,
  "fact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fact being referenced */,
  "related_fact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fact that is related */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_fact_id FOREIGN KEY ("fact_id") REFERENCES facts ("fact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_related_fact_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_fact_id") REFERENCES facts ("fact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the application */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions provided by the user */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the feedback (1-5 scale) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was last updated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., message, comment, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
